name: My Big Botmaking Guide
description:
A giant botmaking guide that will teach you how to make more interesting and better formatted bots, avoid common botmaking mistakes, and take your bots to the next level.

This guide is for botmakers who want to learn more about the intricacies of botmaking. It doesn't matter if you are a relative novice or a veteran botmaker - as long as you have some experience with botmaking, this guide is for you.

My goal is to help you make bots that are more consistent, exciting, and creative. This is not a complete, comprehensive guide to botmaking, but it provides a bunch of valuable information about the botmaking process that I think most creators ought to know.

This guide is long. It's dense. There's a lot to read. I recommend reading this guide in chunks, taking a break every now and then. If you need to, reread any sections that are confusing. Take your time.

This guide is broken down into 6 main sections, including a bonus section at the end about growing as a creator:

1. The Botmaking Mistakes That Are Plaguing Janitor

2. Other Important Information You Should Know

3. Breaking Down Each Individual Component Of A Bot

4. How To Make A ______ Bot

5. Advanced Botmaking Tips

6. Miscellaneous Tips

7. "Ethical" Advice To Get More Popular On Janitor

THE FULL GUIDE

https://rentry.co/NicholasCSBigAssBotmakingGuide
creator: NicholasCS
